domain_name.title: Domain name
domain_name.description: The FQDN where SimpleStaff will be accessible (e.g. time.bls-isp.net)

super_admin_email.title: Super admin email
super_admin_email.description: Email address for the super admin account

super_admin_password.title: Super admin password
super_admin_password.description: Password for the super admin account

lets_encrypt.title: Request Let's Encrypt certificate
lets_encrypt.description: If true, Traefik will request a free SSL certificate from Let's Encrypt for the configured domain

http2https.title: HTTP to HTTPS redirect
http2https.description: If true, HTTP requests will be redirected to HTTPS
